## Change

Describe the behavior and affected components.

## Risk

State notification, scheduling, configuration, database, and rollback impact.

## Verification

- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] `make test-dags`
- [ ] No real notification was sent
- [ ] Component and configuration manifests are updated
- [ ] Documentation or ADR is updated when required

## Deployment

Provide the exact deploy and rollback path, or state why no production deploy is
required.
